name: Delta Document Classification
description: AI-powered document classification for regulatory documents. Provides tools for entity matching, document type identification, and automated filing workflows.

deltaApiUrl.description: URL of the Delta Platform API (Python backend)

deltaApiToken.description: Authentication token for the Delta Platform API

autoClassifyOnWebhook.description: Automatically trigger classification when Paperless webhook fires

reviewThreshold.description: Confidence threshold below which human review is required (0.0–1.0)

notifyChannel.description: Channel ID to send classification results and review requests

deltaApiUrl.label: Delta API URL
deltaApiUrl.help: The URL where the Delta Platform Python services are running

deltaApiToken.label: API Token
deltaApiToken.help: Token for authenticating with Delta Platform services

reviewThreshold.label: Review Threshold
reviewThreshold.help: Documents classified below this confidence level will be flagged for human review
